Name: Dry Skin
Description: Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.
FullDesc: User heals 1/8 HP each turn during Rain and is immune to Water-type moves, when hit by a Water-type move they get healed for 1/4 of their max HP. User loses 1/8 HP each turn during Harsh Sunlight and takes 1.25x damage from Fire-type moves.

Name: Queenly Majesty
Description: Makes foes unable to use priority attacks.
FullDesc: When user is on the field, opponent's priority moves that target the user and/or its allies will be nullified.

Name: Punk Rock
Description: Boosts power and resistance of sound moves.
FullDesc: User's moves with the Sound flag deal 1.3x damage. User takes 0.5x damage from moves with the Sound flag.

Name: Stench
Description: The stench may cause the target to flinch.
FullDesc: When attacking, user's damaging moves that don't already have a chance to flinch gain a 10% chance to do so. If user is in the lead, reduces wild PokÃ©mon encounter rate by 50%.

Name: Drizzle
Description: The PokÃ©mon makes it rain if it appears in battle.
FullDesc: User summons Rain for 5 turns when entering the field, unless Rain is already present.

Name: Speed Boost
Description: Its Speed stat is gradually boosted.
FullDesc: At the end of every turn, user's Speed is raised by one stage.

Name: Battle Armor
Description: Prevents crits and 1.2x PokÃ©mon's SpDef stat.
FullDesc: Attacks against the user will never be critical hits. User has 1.2x Special Defense against special moves.

Name: Sturdy
Description: It cannot be knocked out with one hit.
FullDesc: User will always survive attacks with 1 HP if it has full HP, and is also immune to One-Hit Knockout moves.

Name: Damp
Description: Prevents the use of self-destructing moves and sets up Water Sport.
FullDesc: When user is on the field, self-destructing moves from all PokÃ©mon on both sides will always fail. Additionally, user sets up Water Sport for 5 turns when entering the field.

Name: Limber
Description: The PokÃ©mon is protected from paralysis.
FullDesc: User cannot be paralyzed, it also cures paralysis from the user if already inflicted.

Name: Sand Veil
Description: Boosts defense in a sandstorm.
FullDesc: User gets 1.5x Defense during a Sandstorm. User takes no damage from Sandstorm. If user is in the lead, reduces wild PokÃ©mon encounter rate by 50% on areas with a Sandstorm.

Name: Static
Description: Contact with the PokÃ©mon may cause paralysis.
FullDesc: When user is hit by a contact move, there's a 30% chance to paralyze the attacker.

Name: Volt Absorb
Description: Restores HP if hit by an Electric-type move.
FullDesc: User is immune to Electric-type moves, when hit by an Electric-type move they get healed for 1/4 of their max HP.

Name: Water Absorb
Description: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.
FullDesc: User is immune to Water-type moves, when hit by a Water-type move they get healed for 1/4 of their max HP.

Name: Oblivious
Description: Prevents it from becoming infatuated.
FullDesc: Prevents the user from becoming infatuated or being taunted, it also cures said statuses from the user if already inflicted. The user is also immune to Intimidate and Dishearten.

Name: Cloud Nine
Description: Eliminates the effects of weather and terrain.
FullDesc: When user is on the field, all effects of the current Weather are nullified. The Weather itself is not nullified.

Name: Compound Eyes
Description: The PokÃ©mon's accuracy is boosted.
FullDesc: User's moves have 1.3x Accuracy. If user is in the lead, increases chances of wild encounters carrying an item.

Name: Insomnia
Description: Prevents the PokÃ©mon from falling asleep.
FullDesc: User cannot fall asleep, it also wakes the user up if already inflicted.

Name: Color Change
Description: Changes the PokÃ©mon's type to the foe's move.
FullDesc: When user is hit by a damaging move of a type different from their current ones, their typing will change into a single type of the same type as the attack.

Name: Immunity
Description: Immunity to poison moves and being poisoned.
FullDesc: User is immune to Poison-type moves, cannot be poisoned or badly poisoned, and also cures said statuses if already inflicted.

Name: Flash Fire
Description: It powers up Fire-type moves if it's hit by one.
FullDesc: User is immune to Fire-type moves. The first time they're hit by a Fire-type move, their own Fire-type moves will deal 1.5x damage until they switch out. If user is in the lead, has 50% chance to force wild encounters to be Fire types.

Name: Shield Dust
Description: Blocks the added effects of attacks taken.

Name: Own Tempo
Description: Prevents the PokÃ©mon from becoming confused.
FullDesc: Prevents the user from becoming confused, it also cures confusion from the user if already inflicted. The user is also immune to Intimidate and Dishearten.

Name: Suction Cups

FullDesc: User cannot forcibly be switched out by enemy moves or items. If user is in the lead, increases bite rate when fishing.

Name: Intimidate

FullDesc: Lowers all adjacent foes' Attack stat by one stage when user enters the field. If user is in the lead, has 50% chance to prevent random encounters from PokÃ©mon 5 or more levels lower.

Name: Shadow Tag
Description: Prevents the foe from escaping.
FullDesc: When user is on the field, all adjacent opponents cannot switch out or escape.

Name: Rough Skin
Description: Inflicts damage to the foe on physical hit.
FullDesc: When user is hit by a physical move, attacker takes damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP.

Name: Wonder Guard

FullDesc: User takes no damage from Ground-type moves. User is also considered ungrounded and thus unaffected by entry hazards or terrain.

FullDesc: When user is hit by a contact move, there's a 30% chance to either poison, paralyze, or sleep the attacker.

Name: Natural Cure

Name: Lightning Rod

FullDesc: User redirects all single target Electric-type moves towards itself and is immune to Electric-type moves, when hit by an Electric-type move their Special Attack is increased by one stage. If user is in the lead, has 50% chance to force wild encounters to be Electric types.

Name: Swift Swim

Name: Illuminate

Name: Trace

Name: Huge Power
Description: Doubles the PokÃ©mon's Attack stat.

Name: Poison Point
Description: Contact with the PokÃ©mon may poison the attacker.

Name: Inner Focus

Name: Magma Armor

Name: Water Veil

Name: Magnet Pull

Name: Soundproof

Description: The PokÃ©mon gradually regains 1/8 max HP in rain.

Name: Thick Fat

Name: Early Bird
Description: Awakens from sleep 2x as fast.

Name: Keen Eye

Name: Minus
Description: Ups SpAtk if another PokÃ©mon has Plus or Minus.

Name: Sticky Hold

Name: Arena Trap

Name: Vital Spirit
Description: Prevents the PokÃ©mon from falling asleep.

Name: White Smoke
Description: Prevents other PokÃ©mon from lowering its stats.
FullDesc: User's stats cannot be lowered by other PokÃ©mon. If user is in the lead, reduces wild PokÃ©mon encounter rate by 50%.

Description: Doubles the PokÃ©mon's Attack stat.

FullDesc: Attacks against the user will never be critical hits. User has 1.2x Defense against physical moves.

Name: Air Lock

FullDesc: When user is on the field, all effects of the current Weather are nullified. The Weather itself is not nullified.

Name: Anger Point

Name: Heatproof

Name: Iron Fist

Name: Poison Heal
Description: Restores HP if the PokÃ©mon is poisoned.
FullDesc: User takes no damage from poison and bad poison and is healed by 1/8 max HP each turn instead.

Name: Hydration
Description: Prevents problems with status in rainy weather.
FullDesc: User will recover from any non-volatile status effects it's suffering from at the end of each turn during Rain.

Name: Solar Power

Name: Quick Feet
Description: Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.
FullDesc: User gets 1.5x Speed when under any non-volatile status condition. The user also does not have its Speed lowered when paralyzed. If user is in the lead, reduces wild PokÃ©mon encounter rate by 50%.

Name: Storm Drain
Description: Draws in all Water-type moves to up SpAtk.
FullDesc: User redirects all single target Water-type moves towards itself and is immune to Water-type moves. When hit by a Water-type move, their Special Attack is increased by one stage. If user is in the lead, has 50% chance to force wild encounters to be Water types.

Name: Ice Body
Description: The PokÃ©mon regains 1/8 max HP in hail.
FullDesc: User regains 1/8 max HP every turn during Hail. User takes no damage from Hail.

Name: Solid Rock
Description: Reduces damage from super-effective attacks.
FullDesc: User takes 0.75x damage from super-effective attacks.

Name: Snow Warning

Name: Multitype

Description: Powers up Ground-type moves.

FullDesc: User's Rock-type moves deal 1.5x damage. Stacks multiplicatively with STAB.

FullDesc: When user is hit by a move that makes contact, there's a 30% chance to trap the attacker in Infestation.

FullDesc: When HP is reduced to 50% or less, user's Defense and Special Defense are lowered by one stage, while their Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised by one stage.

FullDesc: User's moves with the Slicing flag deal 1.5x damage.

Name: Requiem
Description: Powers up Dark-type moves.
FullDesc: User's Dark-type moves deal 1.5x damage. Stacks multiplicatively with STAB.

Name: Affection
Description: Powers up Fairy-type moves.
FullDesc: User's Fairy-type moves deal 1.5x damage. Stacks multiplicatively with STAB.

Name: Disarray

Name: Comet Storm

FullDesc: User is immune to Rock-type moves, when hit by a Rock-type move their Special Attack and Speed is increased by one stage.

FullDesc: When user is on the field, adjacent grounded enemies cannot escape or switch out. When user is hit by a move that makes contact, there's a 30% chance to trap the attacker in a Whirlpool.

Name: Hadron Engine

FullDesc: User sets up Electric Terrain for 5 turns when entering the field unless Electric Terrain is already present, and gets 1.33x Attack and Special Attack when under Electric Terrain.

FullDesc: User's Ghost-type moves deal 1.5x damage. Stacks multiplicatively with STAB.

FullDesc: User is immune to moves with the Wind flag, when hit by a move with the Wind flag or entering Tailwind, their Attack and Special Attack is increased by one stage.

Name: TV Face
Description: Prevent a physical attack. Restored in elec. terrain.
FullDesc: Protects from one physical attack, entering electric terrain will restore this shield. Form and stats change when the shield is down.

Name: Dark Swarm
Description: At Lv20+, forms a dark swarm while it has >25% HP.

Name: Symphony
Description: At Lv20+, Forms a symphony while it has >25% HP.

Name: Dest. Core
Description: It changes form if its HP becomes half or less.
FullDesc: User's default form is immune to non-volative status effects. If user has 50% or less HP at the end of the turn or at the start of combat, they change to Reactive Form. This form has reduced defenses but increased Attack and Speed. They change back into their default form if they have more than 50% HP at the end of the turn, and also at the end of combat.

Name: Wind Fury
Description: Boosts wind moves 30%/ Reduces Wind dmg 50%.
FullDesc: User's moves with the Wind flag deal 1.3x damage. User takes 0.5x damage from moves with the Wind flag.

Name: Regrowth
Description: Regains 1/16 max HP or lowered stats each turn.
FullDesc: All of user's lowered stats are restored by 1 stage at the end of each turn, if user has no lowered stats regain 1/16 max HP at the end of each turn instead.

Name: Orichalcum Pulse
Description: Harsh Sunlight activates and ups Atk/SpAtk.
FullDesc: User summons Harsh Sunlight for 5 turns when entering the field unless Harsh Sunlight is already present, and gets 1.33x Attack and Special Attack when under Harsh Sunlight.

Name: Protosynthesis
Description: Boosts its best stat in harsh sunlight.
FullDesc: Under Harsh Sunlight or when the user is holding a Booster Energy, the user's highest non-HP stat (taking into account stat changes but not items) increases by 30% (50% for Speed).

Name: Quark Drive
Description: Boosts its best stat in Electric Terrain.
FullDesc: Under Electric Terrain or when the user is holding a Booster Energy, the user's highest non-HP stat (taking into account stat changes but not items) increases by 30% (50% for Speed).

Name: Cartographer

FullDesc: Changes type and stats depending on the terrain in play. Grassy (+Atk), Psychic (+Def/SpDef), Misty (+Spe), Electric (+SpAtk).

Name: Deep Chill
Description: Special moves may frostbite the attacker.
FullDesc: When user is hit by a special move, there's a 30% chance to frostbite the attacker.

Name: Superconductive
Description: Frostbite does 1/2 damage and ups physical attacks.
FullDesc: User's physical attacks deal 1.5x damage when frostbitten. User takes halved damage from frostbite.

Name: Forest King
Description: Grassy Terrain activates and ups Atk/SpAtk.
FullDesc: User sets up Grassy Terrain for 5 turns when entering the field unless Grassy Terrain is already present, and gets 1.33x Attack and Special Attack when under Grassy Terrain.

Name: Thermal Exchange

FullDesc: When user is hit by either a Fire-type or Ice-Type move, their Attack and Special Attack both raise by one stage. Prevents the user from being Burned and Frostbitten, it also cures said statuses if already inflicted.

Name: Orbit

FullDesc: User sets up Gravity for 5 turns when entering the field, unless Gravity is already in effect.

Name: Flexible

FullDesc: User's moves that don't share a type with it deal 1.3x damage.

Name: Rebellious

FullDesc: If user's stats have been lowered by an opponent, they will deal 1.3x damage until they switch out. The damage boost remains even if the lowered stats are restored.

Name: Gorging
Description: Draining moves deal 30% more damage.

Name: Resonant

FullDesc: User's spread moves deal 1.33x damage when they hit multiple different targets (essentially cancelling the spread move damage penalty).

Name: Impulsive

FullDesc: User deals 1.4x damage with their moves, but their Attack will be lowered by one stage after using physical moves, and their Special Attack will be lowered by one stage after using special moves.

Name: Vandal
Description: Deals 30% more damage to targets that have an item.

Name: Feedback
Description: Inflicts damage to the foe on special hit.
FullDesc: When user is hit by a special move, attacker takes damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP.

Name: Retribution
Description: Inflicts damage to the foe on special hit.
FullDesc: When user is hit by a special move, attacker takes damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP.

Name: Force Field
Description: Inflicts damage to the foe on special hit.
FullDesc: When user is hit by a special move, attacker takes damage equal to 1/8 of their max HP.
